goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'friday' and should 'leave after 10:00'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'bishops stortford'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '7 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'rosa's bed and breakfast'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for 'the same group of people' and '2 nights' starting from 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on friday and should leave after 10:00
The train should go to cambridge and should depart from bishops stortford
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 7 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called rosa's bed and breakfast
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 2 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
